## What & why
<!-- What does this change, and why? -->

## Adding or updating a project?
- [ ] Added/updated the entry in `data/repos.json`
- [ ] Screenshot(s) referenced from the source repo's `docs/`
- [ ] Set a `live` block **only** if it runs in a browser (static, no backend)
- [ ] `npm run build && npm run validate` passes locally
